title: Sync order of form questions to main table
excerpt:
Description
I would like the option to sync the order of questions on form with the order that they appear on a main board. Similar to how the column titles can sync there is an option to toggle on/off. It would be great…

posts.author: JRooney (Jennifer Rooney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like the option to sync the order of questions on form with the order that they appear on a main board. Similar to how the column titles can sync there is an option to toggle on/off. It would be great to have this option for the order of items on the form and board.

What are you trying to achieve

improve my work flow and save time from manually having to reorder my main board.

posts.author: Joshua.west.mba (Joshua West)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes!

Jennifer is right, it would be great.

I am very suprised this is the standard approach as I would imagine 90%+ of people are going to want the board order to match the form order??

Personally, it is incredibly frustrating to have to reorder 50+ columns on numerous boards because the columns are in a totally random order. It is very time consuming and almost entirely negates the use of the Monday.com AI to create the form.

Please, please, please make the form order and column order match Monday.com, you have some many great time saving approaches, but this is a mojor let down.

Thank you very much.
Josh

posts.author: Bex_from_AST (Adventure Specialties Trust)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yeah, this seems like a no-brainer. I’ve just created a super long, detailed form and then gone over to the table to see that all the questions are in the most bizarre order. No logic there, very frustrating.

The feature could have a “sync or order manually” setting, so everyone can choose whether they want the table to sync with the form, or whether they want to reorder the table columns manually.
